products.name: The Dirty Dirty

products.name: The Green Piece
notes: Current Cleveland Park Toast presentation; modifiers and alcohol excluded.

products.name: The Mountain Shiksa
notes: Cleveland Toast explicitly says “pastrami spiced lox” (direct fish basis); retains maple-pecan cream cheese (milk).

products.name: The Original
notes: Cleveland Toast explicitly says “fresh lox” (direct fish basis) and cream cheese (milk).

products.name: The Original Sinner
notes: Cleveland Toast says only “The Original” with Bacon; it does not explicitly repeat lox/salmon/fish, so retain milk-only and do not infer fish from the referenced presentation.
